changeSet.author: folio
changeSet.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS apply_jsonb_patch(jsonb, jsonb) CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS migrate_series_and_subjects(jsonb) CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS alternative_title_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS bound_with_part_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS call_number_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS classification_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS contributor_name_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS electronic_access_relationship_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS holdings_note_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS holdings_record_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS holdings_records_source_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS holdings_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS hrid_settings_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS identifier_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS ill_policy_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS instance_date_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS instance_note_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS instance_relationship_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS instance_relationship_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS instance_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS instance_source_marc_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS instance_status_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS item_damaged_status_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS item_note_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS item_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS loan_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS location_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS loccampus_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS locinstitution_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS loclibrary_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS material_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS mode_of_issuance_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nature_of_content_term_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS preceding_succeeding_title_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS service_point_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS service_point_user_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_alternative_title_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_bound_with_part_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_call_number_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_classification_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_contributor_name_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_electronic_access_relationship_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_holdings_note_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_holdings_record_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_holdings_records_source_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_holdings_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_hrid_settings_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_identifier_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_ill_policy_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_instance_date_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_instance_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_instance_note_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_instance_relationship_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_instance_relationship_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_instance_source_marc_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_instance_status_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_item_damaged_status_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_item_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_item_note_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_loan_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_location_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_loccampus_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_locinstitution_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_loclibrary_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_material_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_mode_of_issuance_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_nature_of_content_term_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_preceding_succeeding_title_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_service_point_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_service_point_user_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_statistical_code_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_statistical_code_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_subject_source_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS set_subject_type_md_json() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS statistical_code_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS statistical_code_type_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS subject_source_set_md() CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS subject_type_set_md() CASCADE;
